Video.summary: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. Two suspects proclaim their innocence after walking away from a hit and run. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets ‘too friendly’ with a woman in their home.
Video.title: Set Some Boundaries

Video.summary: An ex-felon threatens to kill his spouse after she announces she want to divorce him. A driver is stopped with suspicious plants in her car. A woman crashes her friends truck into a pedestrian and a tree.
Video.title: Tree Hugging

Video.summary: A traffic stop over a broken brake light turns into a foot chase. A man handles bad news by throwing his furniture out of the window. A vehicle pursuit ends with a K-9 unit’s help.
Video.title: Now It's Lawn Furniture

Video.summary: Deputies pursue a man wanted in connection with a family violence call. Detectives are called to a dispute between neighbors over an unleashed dog. Officers stop a suspect and find paperwork containing dozens of others Social Security numbers.
Video.title: Doggie Dispute

Video.summary: A man on parole dumps a stolen car and flees from officers on foot. A man denies stealing a wallet from a car with a smashed window. A hostile woman gives officers a false name.
Video.title: Memory Loss

Video.summary: Officers wrestle an uncooperative driver to the ground after a traffic stop. Deputies search for a man who sent threatening texts to his ex-girlfriend. Two suspects are caught stealing gas.
Video.title: Petrol Heist

Video.summary: Deputies confront an intoxicated man who threatened a restaurant owner. A man tells officers he can assault who he wants. Officers are called to an altercation over a sleeping bag and a backpack.
Video.title: Check Please!

Video.summary: Police follow a car after it leaves a drug house. A police officer in Las Vegas goes undercover posing as a ‘john.’ Officers give chase when they observe a car making an illegal U-Turn.
Video.title: Read the Signs

Video.summary: Police set up a undercover operation to bust a suspect who wants to hire a hit man to kill her husband. Unknown to her, the hit man she hired is an undercover police officer. The suspect denies doing anything wrong despite all of her crimes being caught on camera.
Video.title: Hitman for Hire

Video.summary: Officers are called to remove a man sleeping in a parking spot at Wal-Mart. A free-spirited couple takes their relationship to their front lawn. A resident brings a knife to a meeting with his building property manager.
Video.title: All The World's Our Bedroom

Video.summary: A suspect attempts to flee when officers tell him they will search him. Two men get in a fight over window installation. A hotel room is filled like a clown car with multiple suspects.
Video.title: Two Mr. Fix Its

Video.summary: Officers search for a runaway suspect with a weapons charge. A man admits to having a large number of drugs during a traffic stop. Officers respond to a man with a gun in an alley.
Video.title: Alleycat

Video.summary: A woman claims a man abused her then put a curse on her. Police arrest a man for having illegal drugs on him. An elderly woman locks herself in the restroom at a bank.
Video.title: Voo Doo Curse

Video.summary: An Officer goes undercover as a prostitute. A woman finds a snake in her home. A man solicits himself to an undercover officer.
Video.title: You Had Me Fooled

Video.summary: Officers discover a grand theft auto suspect hiding in his apartment. Officers assist the fire department in capturing a brown bear from a palm tree. Officers respond to a shooting.
Video.title: Bear the Cost

Video.summary: Officers respond to a threatening man with a weapon. A man gives Officers a false name forgetting he’s wearing his name tag. A suspect in a stolen car collides with another vehicle then flees on foot.
Video.title: What’s my name again?

Video.summary: A car pursuit turned foot chase ends with the suspect jumping head first into a creek-bed. Officers catch up to a man trying to flee the scene after assaulting his wife. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle driving with no headlights.
Video.title: In The Ditch

Video.summary: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.
Video.title: Who Wet the Dogs Out

Video.summary: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen driving backwards on a one-way street.
Video.title: Anger Management

Video.summary: Officers respond to a traffic accident after a man runs his truck through a wall. An undercover officer poses as a “john” and later a vehicle is stopped due to a missing license plate.
Video.title: Stonewalled

Video.summary: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer investigates a local bar known for illegal activity.
Video.title: Trouble Brewing

Video.summary: A bewildered driver claims that he did not see the lights or hear the sirens when signaled to stop. A manager of an apartment complex is assaulted by their intoxicated tenants.
Video.title: Wreckless Tenants

Video.summary: Officers respond after two men kick in a woman's door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. An officer arrests a husband for domestic abuse.
Video.title: Copy of Breaking Home Barriers

Video.summary: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers give a driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.
Video.title: Bad Fences make for Bad Neighbors

Image.alt: Bad Fences make for Bad Neighbors
Bad Fences make for Bad Neighbors
Bad Fences make for Bad Neighbors
Bad Fences make for Bad Neighbors
Bad Fences make for Bad Neighbors
Bad Fences make for Bad Neighbors
Bad Fences make for Bad Neighbors
Bad Fences make for Bad Neighbors
Bad Fences make for Bad Neighbors

Video.summary: Officers intervene when an estranged husband kicks his ex-wife’s boyfriend’s car. A man claims someone gave him the car he is driving. A woman claims the pills in her purse are not hers.
Video.title: Kick the Car

Video.summary: A man sneaking away from a bar fight claims he was chased by a truck. Deputies are called when a woman assaults people at a skating rink. A drunk man abandons his truck on train tracks.
Video.title: Penalty Box

Video.summary: Officers recover a small bag of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.
Video.title: Multiple Identities

Video.summary: A man on the corner is questioned when he’s wearing gang colors in a gang neighborhood. A muscle car spins its tires at a stop light. A woman’s neighbor steals her ‘special’ plants.
Video.title: Rethink Your Wardrobe

Video.summary: A driver denies ownership of what police find in his car. Police conduct a narcotics sting that nets several arrests. A deputy removes a pooch from the scene of an accident.
Video.title: Pup and Rescue

Video.summary: The K-9 unit responds when a gunman takes to the rooftops. A drug exchange goes awry when the dealer tries to ditch his stash. A pickup-driving drunk tries to play it off when he smashes his neighbor's parked car.
Video.title: Get Off My Roof

Video.summary: A transgender woman in a wheelchair opens a can of whoop ass on an aggressive bully. Officers find a barely dressed couple in the midst of a biting match. A reckless driver doesn’t take too kindly to being pulled over.
Video.title: Love Bites

Video.summary: Officers are forced to taze a suicidal man for his own good. A familiar face makes cops chase him through a grass field. No lie is too big for a suspect who seeks refuge in a condemned house.
Video.title: We Know Who You Are

Video.summary: A group of suspects race a stolen SUV through a residential neighborhood. A drunk man has a kitchen knife and a listening problem. Two usual suspects are going back to jail for their latest escapades.
Video.title: Familiar Faces

Video.summary: An uncooperative suspect obeys instructions from his more levelheaded relative. A dead ringer for “The Rock” uncovers some crack rock. Officers try to get the truth out of two known drug users.
Video.title: Not My Crack

Video.summary: Hitching a ride home with the wrong guy almost lands one woman in the slammer. A known prostitute won’t be going on a second date. When a domestic partner refuses to leave home, officers intervene.
Video.title: Drunk in Love

Video.summary: A well-known local nuisance gets caught bothering people once again. Officers get a kick out of a usual suspect with money in his shoe. Cops try to make sense of a man who’s barely coherent and barely dressed.
Video.title: The One Dollar Shoe

Video.summary: Police use convenience store footage to make an arrest for burglary. Police attempt to help two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.
Video.title: Mud Slingers

Video.summary: An officer arrests a driver who attempts to swallow drugs stashed in his mouth. An officer arrests a repeated drug offender in an area notorious for drug trafficking. An officer pulls over an unlicensed woman driver who is arrested for providing falsified identification.
Video.title: Pretty White Lies

Video.summary: Officers arrest a female driver for drug possession and whose mother scolds her before she’s carted off to jail. An officer arrests a man who alleges that he’s waiting for his date for outstanding warrants and a stolen vehicle. An officer takes a known prostitute to jail.
Video.title: Wake Up Jamie

Video.summary: Officers give chase to a suspect on a bike. The passenger of a vehicle is arrested for possession. Police are given a classic "I'm holding it for a friend" excuse.
Video.title: Dog Eat Dog

Video.summary: An officer is attacked while attempting to break up a fight. Officers confiscate marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.
Video.title: I Want Charges

Video.summary: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over narcotics. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.
Video.title: My Better Half

Video.summary: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcyclist. A man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother after a boating trip. Police seize a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo from a man.
Video.title: Boat Guy

Video.summary: An Officer’s patrol of an area known for drug activity turns into a foot chase that ends with the suspect running into a tree. An altercation following a minor car accident is resolved after the men apologize for their parts in the confrontation. Two suspects are arrested during an undercover sting designed to capture online child predators.
Video.title: Dude, I'm sorry

Video.summary: A suspect bails out of his vehicle when a car chase reaches a dead-end. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call and recommends that the quarreling couple get a divorce. Officers investigate a suspected drug transaction.
Video.title: Tit for Tat

Video.summary: A stolen vehicle pursuit ends in a take down and recovery of additional evidence. A store employee flags down an officer who steps in to make a theft related arrest. An officer is accompanied by several units in pursuit of a stolen vehicle.
Video.title: Car Thief

Video.summary: Officers find drugs after pursuing a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car. Officers intervene in a domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.
Video.title: School Zone Chase

Video.summary: A suspected copper thief plays dumb when the cops catch up to him. A jittery cyclist tries to get away with a slippery maneuver. A couple takes their bout of domestic violence to the streets.
Video.title: Smooth Move

Video.summary: A couple attempts to give the cops the slip during a storm. A motorist tries to resist deputies, but his moves are outdated. Police encounter a suspiciously sweaty man on an eerily dim street.
Video.title: Dishonest Dudes

Video.summary: A woman bursts into tears when pulled over by police. During a sketchy traffic stop, one nervous passenger is quick to help deputies. A suspect blames the contents of his wallet on a stranger.
Video.title: The Blame Game

Video.summary: A man with many warrants puts up a fight when faced with jail. A desperate driver makes a last-minute attempt to hide his crime. A teenager must join the workforce after he makes a costly error.
Video.title: The Young and the Reckless

Video.summary: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn. Officers are forced to intervene when a jilted lover can’t take a hint. A nervous man attempts to hide his crime.
Video.title: One, Two, Tree

Video.summary: Deputies respond to a brutal car wreck. The cops question a robbery suspect who claims to be the real victim. Officers find a man who says that he suffers from a disorder that causes him to run away.
Video.title: Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back

Image.alt: Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back

Video.summary: A suspicious man decides to take his chances with the wrong end of a taser. A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he’s a good guy. Deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Wake Up Call

Video.summary: A detective gets injured while chasing after a suspected car thief. A young couple gets caught up in cuffs after a bar fight. Officers find a surprising variety of items in a suspect’s vehicle.
Video.title: Cookies and Contraband

Video.summary: A man has a heart-pounding experience and requires medical assistance. A lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation. It’s two against one when the cops question an interesting trio.
Video.title: Odd Man Out

Video.summary: Emotions run high during a dispute involving alcohol and a beloved pet. A motorist struggles to keep his story straight. Deputies respond to a domestic episode and find the suspect in an awkward spot.
Video.title: Organized Crime

Video.summary: A young man receives a wakeup call when officers catch him breaking the law. A traffic stop turns up a trio with a lot to hide. Officers play peacemakers after a board game sparks a family feud.
Video.title: A Man Without a Plan
